• Procedural mining world with depth‑based heat, ores, and custom textures.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT, host election, admin panel, chat, and trade system.
  • UI includes dashboard, shop, warp network, settings, and mobile controls.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

This page implements a 2‑D mining game with real‑time multiplayer, a rich UI, and extensible texture and audio systems. Players can mine, build, trade, and explore using customizable controls, while the host manages world state and synchronizes updates.
